narrative:
Perry Twp township has 1,124 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
